stages.name: Live calendar availability produces at least one Brian offerable-time block
stages.requirement: >= 1 available Brian block, including instructor_time_only availability that can later target confirmed containers
stages.next_action: Create or expose a valid Brian availability window in the live calendar snapshot, then rerun the read-only pipeline.

stages.name: Dynamic offers are generated from live availability
stages.requirement: live_availability_snapshot source and at least one generated offer
stages.next_action: Rerun live snapshot and dynamic offer generation; fix source selection only if it stops using live availability.

stages.name: Confirmed-container public filter keeps at least one offer
stages.requirement: >= 1 public sellable offer after confirmed-container filtering
stages.next_action: Add/confirm container coverage or align Brian + Shipyard availability/location matching so at least one offer survives confirmed-container filtering.

stages.name: Seed selection selects at least one seed
stages.next_action: Review seed strategy policy after at least one public sellable offer exists.

stages.name: Deterministic appointment URL preview generates at least one URL
stages.next_action: Run URL preview after seeds exist; fix container/date/range mismatches if seeds block.

stages.name: Internal/admin preview shows the customer-facing button
stages.requirement: Internal/admin preview exists and renders a button for the selected seed
stages.next_action: Build an internal preview surface that renders selected seed details and a disabled/review-only customer-facing button.

stages.name: Manual click/registration creates class in Enrollware
stages.requirement: Zapier/Sheet registration event is normalized and matched to an appointment seed
stages.next_action: Import the Zapier-backed registration sheet CSV with scripts.import_enrollware_registration_events, then rerun this status check.

stages.name: Routine public Enrollware scrape/hot-sync sees the created class
stages.requirement: Existing read-only scrape/hot-sync detects the new Enrollware class
stages.blocker: No created dynamic class has been observed in local sessions yet.
stages.next_action: Run existing read-only hot-sync/scrape after a manual test booking exists.

stages.name: Lander treats that class as real occupancy and recalculates around it
stages.requirement: New dynamic booking appears in occupancy and blocks overlapping offers
stages.blocker: No dynamic test class marker is present to verify recalculation around it.
stages.next_action: After hot-sync sees the class, rerun sessions/current schedule and dynamic offer generation; verify overlap rejections.

stages.name: Class Report later confirms roster details
stages.requirement: Updated Class Report includes the created dynamic class and roster details
stages.blocker: Current Class Report ingest exists, but no dynamic test booking can be identified yet.
stages.next_action: After the manual booking is real, import the next Class Report and confirm the class/roster appears.

first_failing_name: Routine public Enrollware scrape/hot-sync sees the created class
current_blocker: No created dynamic class has been observed in local sessions yet.
next_single_action: Run existing read-only hot-sync/scrape after a manual test booking exists.
